title: Generic Cache

statement.markdown:
Implement a Generic Cache that can store and retrieve values by their keys. The cache should have a maximum size. If the cache is full and a new item needs to be added, the least recently used item should be removed.

### Requirements

1. Implement a method to add a new item to the cache.
2. Implement a method to get a value from the cache by its key.
3. Implement a method to remove an item from the cache by its key.
4. Implement a method to clear the cache.
5. Implement a method to get the size of the cache.

constraints: Use a map to store the cache items
Use a Doubly Linked List to keep track of the order of access
Implement the methods using generics for type safety
Use try-catch blocks for error handling
